---
description: |
  Use when contributing to the my-soc-ops-python repository.
  This repo has only README.md so prefer minimal Python SOC tooling scaffolding.
---

# Workspace instructions for my-soc-ops-python

- Mandatory checklist for proposed changes:
  - lint: include formatting or static analysis guidance
  - build: include project packaging/build command if relevant
  - test: include a test command or coverage plan
- Treat requests as a new minimal Python SOC automation project.
- Prefer small, reviewable changes and ask before adding dependencies.
- When setting up the project, suggest:
  - `src/`, `tests/`, and packaging (`pyproject.toml` or `requirements.txt`)
  - a simple CLI entry point or utility module
  - concise docs and dev commands
